The '''53rd British Academy Film Awards''', more commonly known as the [[BAFTAs]], took place on 9 April 2000 at the [[Odeon Luxe Leicester Square|Odeon Leicester Square]] in [[London]], honouring the best national and foreign films of [[1999 in film|1999]]. Presented by the [[British Academy of Film and Television Arts]], accolades were handed out for the best feature-length film and documentaries of any nationality that were screened at British cinemas in 1999.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://news.bbc.co.uk/1/hi/entertainment/707592.stm |title=Full list of Bafta winners |publisher=[[BBC News]] |date=9 April 2000 |access-date=15 June 2022}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://news.bbc.co.uk/1/hi/entertainment/707568.stm |title=American Beauty shines at Baftas |publisher=[[BBC News]] |date=9 April 2000 |access-date=15 June 2022}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.theguardian.com/film/2000/apr/10/baftas2000.baftasfilm |title=Bafta award choices scorn the Oscar line |last=Gibbons |first=Fiachra |work=[[The Guardian]] |date=10 April 2000 |access-date=15 June 2022}}</ref>

[[Sam Mendes]]'s ''[[American Beauty (1999 film)|American Beauty]]'' won the award for [[BAFTA Award for Best Film|Best Film]] (and previously won the [[Academy Award for Best Picture]]), Actor ([[Kevin Spacey]]), Actress ([[Annette Bening]]), Cinematography, Editing, and Original Music; Spacey previously won the [[Academy Award for Best Actor]]. [[Jude Law]] (''[[The Talented Mr. Ripley (film)|The Talented Mr. Ripley]]'') and [[Maggie Smith]] (''[[Tea with Mussolini]]'') won the awards for Best Supporting Actor and Actress, respectively. [[Pedro Almodóvar]], director of ''[[All About My Mother]]'', won for his direction. ''[[East Is East (1999 film)|East Is East]]'' was voted Outstanding British Film.

The nominations were announced on 1 March 2000 and the ceremony took place at the [[Odeon Luxe Leicester Square|Odeon Leicester Square]] in [[London]], hosted by [[Jack Docherty]].<ref>{{cite web |url=http://news.bbc.co.uk/1/hi/entertainment/662167.stm |title=Bafta nominations in full|publisher=[[BBC News]]|date=1 March 2000|access-date=15 June 2022}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.theguardian.com/media/2000/apr/07/tvandradio.television1|title=All right on the night|work=[[The Guardian]]|date=7 April 2000|access-date=15 June 2022}}</ref>
